pr.title: Set up OpenAI Codex CLI
pr.body:
## Summary

- Install `@openai/codex` CLI (v0.130.0) globally via npm
- Add `AGENTS.md` with project context, coding guidelines, and git workflow for AI coding agents
- Add `.codex/config.yaml` with project-level Codex CLI configuration (model: `o4-mini`, `approvalMode: suggest`)
- Update `README.md` with Codex installation and usage instructions

## Test plan

- [x] Run `codex --version` and confirm `codex-cli 0.130.0` is reported
- [x] Set `OPENAI_API_KEY` and run `codex` in the project root — confirm the interactive REPL launches
- [x] Verify `.codex/config.yaml` is picked up (model and approvalMode respected)
- [x] Confirm `AGENTS.md` is loaded by Codex on session start

https://claude.ai/code/session_015MMnpfgMr4E9GW8VbtfHTi

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_015MMnpfgMr4E9GW8VbtfHTi)_
